name: private-buddy
description: Private Buddy - A private AI chat assistant

scripts.precheck: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='server/dist/private-buddy-server';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('ERROR: Python server build not found at '+p);console.error('Run: cd server && pyinstaller private_buddy.spec');process.exit(1)}console.log('Python server build found: OK')"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:electron
scripts.pack: npm run precheck && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run precheck && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run precheck && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run precheck && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run precheck && npm run build && electron-builder --linux

author: Private Buddy Team
